Pro Players

World pro player profiles

Study major pro players by style, skills, events, paddle line, live DUPR/ranking links, and news-tracking shortcuts.

Live DUPR, results, seedings, and news change frequently. The profile is a learning card; use official sources for current numbers.

USA DUPR check

Ben Johns

All-court control with elite point construction

Ben Johns grew up in Maryland, played multiple racquet sports, and developed into the benchmark modern male pickleball player. His game is built on patient point con…

Anna Leigh Waters

Explosive pressure and fast kitchen attacks
